summary: AI Video Prompt: Product Demo for Presscut
summaryZh: AI 视频提示词：Product Demo for Presscut

artifact.usageMarkdown: 这是一个 AI 视频 Prompt 资产。你可以直接复制 **Agent 提示词** 选项卡中的内容，在本地使用支持 Remotion 技能的 AI 编码助手（如 Claude Code、Cursor 或 Codex）来一键生成视频源码。
artifact.agentPrompt: Create a demo video of the Presscut app/product using remotion. Use react componenents to replicate VI elements and replicate the UI of the app as closely as possible. The app has a LOT of features/ functionality, so take guidance from the marketing home page/index for what to highlight, while keeping language simple and to-thepoint. Really grill me with questions to nail down exactly how the final video should look/feel and what content should be there. The ultimate goal of this is to replicate what me, the founder, would be showing/doing with a product demo with a customer.
